sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97365" key="stu/gnasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στύγν-ᾰσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στυγνότης</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.49.50</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
